meta.intent: Exam the ice future-value band by combining ice, crate tax, dock residue, and water-facing rescue order.
meta.expectedPath: Identify the iced lower rescue route early, avoid broad low-value clears, break ice before water forces panic, then use a planned dock triple during the upper pivot.
meta.expectedFailMode: Generic clearing delays the ice route, causing dock overflow or water pressure before the first rescue is secure.
meta.whatItProves: The player can integrate known ice, dock, water, and crate skills without vine or any new mechanic.
meta.notes: Role: exam. The two iced route blockers create the future-value read; crates add route tax without becoming the primary lesson.
